http-action.responseHeaders: HTTP/2.0 302 Content-Length: 0 location: https://auth.tmsladcp.com/oauth2/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=5f5ul10vparrk59n518gtm1kc9&state=eyJpZGVudGl0eVByb3ZpZGVyIjoiQ09HTklUTyIsImlzTG9jYWwiOiJmYWxzZSJ9&scope=openid&redirect_uri=https://uat-dcp.sla.gov.sg/web/login/response date: Fri, 22 Aug 2025 10:17:23 GMT x-content-type-options: nosniff x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block cache-control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate pragma: no-cache expires: 0 strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN content-security-policy: default-src 'self' blob: 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net fonts.googleapis.com fonts.gstatic.com assets.dcube.cloud www.onemap.gov.sg sst-s3-sla-dcp-uatez-docs-scan-stg-01.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com app.singpass.gov.sg api.qrserver.com dataplane.rum.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com; img-src 'self' data: api.qrserver.com; x-cache: Miss from cloudfront via: 1.1 abf1eb055e021fa76f5b3cc60396ccc4.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) x-amz-cf-pop: BOM78-P10 x-amz-cf-id: XpT3rdC8_Cc43qR1v__CPjrmD9r90AvDo1kXuxcoZxIshdi6GwBkTA== referrer-policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin vary: Origin vary: Origin x-sla-dcp: Govtech2024 server-timing: cfReqDur;dur=315.429 cf-team: 2972e18d980000c1796117e400000001
